checks.note: Average battle duration should sit near the target playtest window.
Too many short battles suggest burst or low HP scaling issues.
Too many long battles suggest defensive scaling or low damage pressure.
Anti-stall should be rare in normal same-level matchups.
Dominance uses <= 20% power delta and excludes same-archetype mirrors.
Every configured level checkpoint should produce matchups.

top_notes: REVIEW: near_power_dominance observed 70.45% max / 25% min, target max <= 65%.
